name: 001_basic_file_copy.sh
expected: destination contains copied source data

name: 002_multiple_sources_directory.sh
expected: both source basenames exist in destination directory

name: 003_target_directory_t.sh
expected: source is copied under target directory

name: 004_no_target_directory_T_error.sh
expected: utility exits nonzero

name: 005_recursive_directory_copy.sh
expected: nested file content exists in copied directory tree

name: 006_archive_preserves_symlink.sh
expected: symlink in copied tree remains a symlink

name: 007_attributes_only_no_data.sh
expected: destination exists but has zero file data

name: 008_backup_simple_existing_dest.sh
expected: simple backup file contains previous destination data

name: 009_backup_suffix_S.sh
expected: backup with custom suffix contains old destination data

name: 010_force_backup_same_file.sh
exercises: special case: -f with -b backs up SOURCE when SOURCE and DEST are same regular file
expected: backup of same-named source is created

name: 011_hard_link_l.sh
exercises: -l/--link hard link files instead of copying
expected: source and destination have identical device and inode

name: 012_symbolic_link_s.sh
exercises: -s/--symbolic-link makes symbolic links instead of copying
expected: destination symlink points to source path

name: 013_no_dereference_P.sh
expected: destination is a symlink

name: 014_dereference_L.sh
exercises: -L/--dereference always follow symbolic links in SOURCE
expected: destination is regular file with referent data

name: 015_follow_command_line_symlink_H.sh
exercises: -H follows command-line symbolic links in SOURCE
expected: copied tree contains file from symlink referent directory

name: 016_d_preserve_hard_links.sh
expected: copied hard-linked sources remain hard-linked to each other

name: 017_preserve_timestamps.sh
expected: destination mtime equals source mtime

name: 018_preserve_mode_p.sh
expected: destination mode equals source mode

name: 019_parents_full_source_name.sh
exercises: --parents uses full source file name under DIRECTORY
expected: copied file exists at DIRECTORY plus full absolute source path

name: 020_no_clobber_n.sh
expected: existing destination content is unchanged

name: 021_update_none_skips.sh
expected: existing destination content is unchanged

name: 022_update_none_fail_error.sh
exercises: --update=none-fail diagnoses and fails on skipped existing destination
expected: utility exits nonzero

name: 023_update_older_replaces_older_dest.sh
expected: older destination content is replaced by source

name: 024_update_older_skips_newer_dest.sh
expected: newer destination content is unchanged

name: 025_remove_destination_symlink.sh
expected: destination path is a regular copied file, not the old symlink

name: 026_interactive_i_decline_tty.sh
expected: negative response leaves existing destination unchanged

name: 027_strip_trailing_slashes_dir_symlink.sh
exercises: --strip-trailing-slashes removes trailing slashes from SOURCE arguments
expected: directory symlink source with slash is copied as a symlink under -P

name: 028_missing_source_error.sh
expected: utility exits nonzero
